goal: Visit this page, take a screenshot, rate the design /10 as a senior product designer. Note 2 concrete defects. This is cloud.tangle.tools — a dark-themed blockchain services dashboard. One-line verdict per page.

action.criteria: As a senior product designer, rate this dark-themed blockchain Credits page out of 10. Assess: visual hierarchy, consistency with dark theme, typography/readability, spacing, color contrast, empty state quality (if present), overall polish, navigation affordances. Identify 2 specific design defects related to UX, visual design, or information architecture.

steps.expectedEffect: Will receive a design evaluation with rating out of 10, identification of 2 concrete defects, and assessment of visual design quality for the Credits page
